# Drafinity LLC

> Drafinity LLC is a professional drafting support, 3D rendering, BIM modeling, and building documentation support company headquartered in Albuquerque, New Mexico, serving clients across the United States since 2015. We deliver construction documentation, permit drawing preparation support, and design visualization services for residential, commercial, and industrial projects using AI-enhanced workflows for faster turnaround.

## Company Facts
- **Legal name**: Drafinity LLC
- **Founded**: 2015
- **Headquarters**: 1209 Mountain Road Pl NE, Albuquerque, NM 87110, USA
- **Service area**: United States (availability depends on project requirements and applicable local rules)
- **Phone**: +1 (917) 728-1625
- **Email**: info@drafinity.us
- **Website**: https://drafinity.us
- **Business hours**: Mon–Fri 9 AM – 6 PM, Sat 10 AM – 4 PM (MT)
- **Projects completed**: 500+
- **Client satisfaction**: 100%
- **Quote turnaround**: Free quote within 24 hours

## Services
- 2D Drafting Support (floor plans, elevations, sections, site plans, as-builts)
- 3D Modeling & Photorealistic Rendering (V-Ray, Lumion, Enscape)
- BIM Modeling in Autodesk Revit (LOD 100–500), clash detection, BIM 360
- Structural Drafting Support (foundations, framing, steel, concrete, wood)
- MEP Drafting Support (mechanical, electrical, plumbing, HVAC load calcs)
- Licensed Review Coordination Support & Permit Expediting
- Construction Documentation Support (permit drawing preparation, IBC/IRC/ADA reference)
- Material Estimation & Quantity Takeoffs
- Interior Design & Visualization
- AI-Enhanced Generative Design & Automated Code Checking

## Software & Tools We Use
AutoCAD, Revit, ArchiCAD, SketchUp, 3ds Max, V-Ray, Lumion, Enscape, BIM 360, Navisworks, Bluebeam, ETABS, SAP2000, RISA-3D, STAAD.Pro, Tekla Structures, Civil 3D, MicroStation.

## Why Choose Drafinity
- Professional drafting and documentation support for a wide range of project types
- Permit drawing preparation support — licensed review and approval by client's chosen licensed professional
- Free quotes delivered within 24 hours
- AI-augmented workflows deliver projects up to 3× faster
- 500+ successful projects, 100% client satisfaction since 2015
- Transparent communication and dedicated project managers
